title: Order on the request of Legal Representatives of Victims a/0011/06, a/0012/06, a/0013/06, a/0015/06, a/0023/07, a/0024/07, a/0026/07, a/0029/07, a/0036/07, a/0037/07 and a/0038/07 for an extension of the page limit
text:
- The Appeals Chamber notes that pursuant to regulation 37 (2) of the Regulations of the Court, a page limit may be extended in exceptional circumstances. In its Decision on Victim Participation the Appeals Chamber decided that in the interests of efficiency it would treat all three appeals jointly. Therefore, in the circumstances it is reasonable to expect that the observations of the victims would be more extensive. (para. 7).

- The Appeals Chamber considers that the issues on appeal though complex do overlap and in its view an extension of the page limit by 10 pages is sufficient. Accordingly, an extension of the page limit for the filing of the observations of the victims is granted. (para. 8).
keywords: reg. 37.2 RoC ; page limits ; extension of page limits ; exceptional circumstances ;
